name: dogfood-todo
vision: Minimal todo list for SAMVIL nightly dogfood smoke. Not a real product.
description: Tiny todo app used as a stable fixture for the SAMVIL dogfood smoke test. Three features (create / complete / persist) and four ACs.

key_interactions: Type a task name and press Enter to add it.
Click a task to toggle its done state.
Reload the page; tasks remain in the list.

constraints: Single-user, local only — no auth or backend.
Must build with vite-react default scaffold.

features.name: create-task
features.description: User adds a new todo item.

acceptance_criteria.description: Pressing Enter on a non-empty input adds the item to the list.
Empty input is ignored (no item created).

features.name: complete-task
features.description: User toggles a task as done.

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a task toggles its 'done' state and shows strikethrough.
Tasks are stored in localStorage and restored on next page load.
